title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda used AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for early-onset breast cancer vaccine development. The tools ran on modest hardware (laptop and server), enabling them to narrow 15,000 potential binding sites to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation.
